name: FileSystem
description: FileSystem schema from Pure1 Public REST API

allOf.description: A built-in resource that exists on one or multiple arrays.
A file system on an array, including both FlashArray and FlashBlade file systems.

created.description: Creation time in milliseconds since UNIX epoch.

fast_remove_directory_enabled.description:
On a FlashBlade file system, returns the value of `true` if fast remove directory
is enabled and `false` if it is not.
On a FlashArray file system, the value is always `null`.

hard_limit_enabled.description:
On a FlashBlade file system, returns the value of `true` if the file system's size
is a hard limit quota and `false` if it is not.
On a FlashArray file system, the value is always `null`.

http.description: HTTP configuration. On a FlashArray file system, the value is always `null`.
http.title: Http

nfs.description: NFS configuration. On a FlashArray file system, the value is always `null`.
nfs.title: Nfs

provisioned.description:
The provisioned size of the file system in bytes. A value of 0 means
unlimited. On a FlashArray file system, the value is always `null`.

smb.description: SMB configuration. On a FlashArray file system, the value is always `null`.
smb.title: Smb

snapshot_directory_enabled.description:
On a FlashBlade file system, returns the value of `true` if snapshot directory is enabled
and `false` if it is not.
On a FlashArray file system, the value is always `null`.
